name: Loppy
description: Personal knowledge management plugin implementing Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern. Ingests sources, compiles wikis, and provides LLM-driven knowledge retrieval.
author: Anthropic

commands.name: config
commands.longDescription: Reads and displays the current Loppy config from ~/.config/loppy/config.json. Shows vault paths and batch settings.

commands.name: next
commands.longDescription: Lists up to N unprocessed source files from the sources directory. Use with 'loppy move' to mark as processed.

commands.name: move
commands.longDescription: Relocates a source file from sources_dir to processed/. If vault is a git repo, uses git mv for history preservation.

commands.name: index-merge
commands.description: Update wiki index with new pages
commands.longDescription: Reads JSON from stdin with page metadata and merges into index.md. Auto-detects orphaned pages and maintains TSV format.

commands.name: log
commands.longDescription: Adds timestamped entry to log.md. Prepends to file maintaining newest-first order.

commands.name: lint-frontmatter
commands.longDescription: Scans all markdown pages in wiki_dir and validates YAML frontmatter. Checks required fields, enum values, staleness, broken links. Returns JSON findings.

hooks.name: Guard Vault Operations
hooks.description: Blocks destructive Bash commands (rm, shred, mv) targeting vault directories

slashCommands.name: wiki
slashCommands.description: LLM-driven wiki management: ingest sources, query knowledge, lint schemas

subcommands.name: ingest
subcommands.description: Ingest single source or batch-ingest from raw sources

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of sources to batch-ingest (default: batch_size from config)

subcommands.name: query
subcommands.description: Query the wiki knowledge base by keyword, tag, type, or domain

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term, tag, type, or domain filter

subcommands.name: lint
subcommands.description: Validate wiki schema: required fields, enum values, broken links, staleness

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Specific page to lint (optional; defaults to all pages)

vault_dir.description: Absolute path to vault base directory

sources_dir.description: Absolute path to raw sources directory

wiki_dir.description: Absolute path to compiled wiki directory

batch_size.description: Number of pages to ingest at a time in batch mode (default: 5)
